response.justification: The candidate brings 20 years of broad software engineering experience and some entrepreneurial background (GISCollective), which partially addresses the role's baseline requirements. However, the AI expertise is shallow and almost entirely confined to the most recent year at re:cinq, with no demonstrated AI strategy, AI platform leadership at scale, or recognized external thought leadership in AI. The role demands Director-level depth and the ability to advise strategic customers on cutting-edge AI adoption — neither the seniority track record nor the AI-specific credentials are present.
strengths: 20+ years of hands-on engineering across diverse stacks, comfortably clearing the 15-year minimum
Entrepreneurial experience founding and maintaining GISCollective, plus early freelance and startup roles
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq signals genuine interest and early-stage capability
concerns: AI expertise is limited to roughly one year and lacks any evidence of building recognized AI products or platforms at scale
Career trajectory and current title (Senior Software Developer) fall well short of the Director-level IC seniority the role requires
No advanced degree in an AI-related field and no visible thought leadership (publications, keynotes, advisory roles) in AI or cloud strategy

key_factors.factor: No strategic or advisory track record
Broad engineering tenure and entrepreneurial background
